sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49011" key="qranitiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρᾱν-ῑτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n49011.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θρανίτης, κώπη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
